title: Troubleshooting

book.title: NVIDIA NeMo Guardrails Library Developer Guide

content: Troubleshooting This page provides solutions to issues you may encounter while using NeMo Guardrails. If you encounter an issue that is not listed here, open an issue on GitHub. Nested AsyncIO Loop NeMo Guardrails is an async-first toolkit, i.e., the core functionality is implemented using async functions. To provide a blocking API, the toolkit must invoke async functions inside synchronous code using asyncio.run . However, the current Python implementation for asyncio does not allow “nested event loops”. This issue is being discussed by the Python core team and, most likely, support will be added (see GitHub Issue 66435 and Pull Request 93338 ). Meanwhile, NeMo Guardrails makes use of nest_asyncio . The patching is applied when the nemoguardrails package is loaded the first time. If the blocking API is not needed, or the nest_asyncio patching causes unexpected problems, you can disable it by setting the DISABLE_NEST_ASYNCIO=True environment variable
summary: This page provides solutions to issues you may encounter while using NeMo Guardrails. If you encounter an issue that is not listed here, open an issue on GitHub.
